behavior: the probe knows the 2026 TTS selection candidates and records unavailable credentials without values
the deterministic 15-word guard runs before any TTS provider submission
one neutral voice is selected once per provider session and reused for all submissions
a TTSProvider returns a ReadableStream whose first audio chunk is a non-empty Uint8Array
configured real TTS candidates are benchmarked by time-to-first-audio-byte and the winner is <=200 ms
five fixed state phrases are pre-cached as static clips and play from memory in <100 ms
probe report, selection record, pre-cache record, and trace contain no key-shaped strings
